title: MSF Pack OF 2 Yellow PROSOLVE 50mm x 50m Yellow Premium Gaffer Tape Cloth Gaffa Duct Waterproof Pack OF 2.Size (50mm x 50m, 2 X YELLOW)
features: PROSOLVE 50mm x 50m White, Red, Green, Blue, Black, Silver, And Yellow Premium Gaffer Tape Cloth Gaffa Duct Waterproof Pack OF (1, 2, 5, 10)
Heavy Duty Tape, suitable for Indoor / Outdoor Use. This is a tough, waterproof heavy duty repair tape

description: PROSOLVE 50mm x 50m White, Red, Green, Blue, Black, Silver, And Yellow Premium Gaffer Tape Cloth Gaffa Duct Waterproof Pack OF (1, 2, 5, 10) Heavy Duty Tape, suitable for Indoor / Outdoor Use.
